query:
-- Check the Kawana 4G Backup SIM service (S1043 from the screenshot)
-- and any other SasBoss services with cost = revenue (0% margin)
SELECT 
  serviceId,
  planName,
  customerName,
  supplierName,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  LEFT(discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue
  AND monthlyCost > 0
  AND supplierName != 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY supplierName, customerName
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute

-- and any other SasBoss services with cost = revenue (0% margin)
SELECT 
  serviceId,
  planName,
  customerName,
  supplierName,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  LEFT(discoveryNotes, 150) as notes
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue
  AND monthlyCost > 0
  AND supplierName != 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY supplierName, customerName
LIMIT 20;
